title: The Similarity autoresearch experiment report
description: Standardized report format for baseline-vs-experiment comparisons. Every autoresearch run must produce one report conforming to this schema so results are auditable and machine-readable.

report_id.description: Unique identifier for this report (UUID4 or deterministic slug).

run_id.description: Links to the experiment-ledger entry that triggered this report.

benchmark_id.description: Identifier of the benchmark manifest used (e.g. jepa-retrieval-core-v1).

lane_id.description: Identifier of the autoresearch lane (e.g. jepa-retrieval-lane-v1).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the report was generated.

branch.description: Git branch the experiment ran on.

commit.description: Git commit SHA at the time of the experiment.

datasets_used.description: List of dataset names or paths evaluated in this experiment.

retrieval_comparison.description: Optional retrieval-quality comparison between baseline and experiment.

top_k_overlap.description: Fraction of top-K matches shared between baseline and experiment (Jaccard over top-K sets).

rank_correlation.description: Spearman rank correlation between baseline and experiment match rankings.

rank_lift_summary.description: Human-readable summary of rank changes (e.g. 'top-1 match moved from rank 3 to rank 1').

backtest_metrics.description: Per-dataset breakdown of backtest metrics for both baseline and experiment.

before.description: Per-dataset metrics from the baseline run.

after.description: Per-dataset metrics from the experiment run.

aggregate_metrics.description: Overall summary metrics comparing baseline and experiment.

deltas.description: after - before for each metric. Negative CRPS/mean_error/calibration_error = improvement.

recommendation.description: Automated or human decision on whether to land the experiment.

artifacts.description: Repo-relative file paths to related outputs (plots, logs, model checkpoints).

crps.description: Continuous Ranked Probability Score (lower is better).

calibration_error.description: Average absolute calibration error across P10-P90 (lower is better).

hit_rate.description: Fraction of trials where actual outcome fell within the forecast cone.

runtime_seconds.description: Wall-clock time for this dataset's backtest.
